options.name: -hinst
options.description: list of partition hinst names. QoR will be computed for all pins of these hinst. Default: all partition and clone hinsts

options.name: -maxFanOut
options.description: QoR report will not be generated for pins if the number of instances in the timing cone fanout of this pin exceeds this max fan out count. Default: 1000

options.name: -maxRegisterFanOut
options.description: <register_fan_out_count> QoR report will not be generated for pins if the number of registers in the timing cone fanout of this pin exceeds this max fan out count. Default: 50

options.name: -outFile
options.description: QoR data will be output in this file. Default: ./pin_qor.txt

options.name: -ptn
options.description: list of partition names. QoR will be computed for all pins of these partitions. Default: all partitions (and clones)
